content: agent2: implementing 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image.py). Only touching the save() method area. Will merge your branch before submitting.

agent2: got it, I'm adding backup/backup_suffix params in the same save() method (near param popping + before builtins.open for write). Overlap is in the save() body — I added 'backup = params.pop("backup", False)' near the top and a shutil.copy2 backup block right before the file is opened for writing. Should merge cleanly since dry_run logic is likely elsewhere in the function, but flag if you touch the same lines around 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)'.
